description_long: This is a compact log cabin with a dark, wide gable roof that overhangs the walls, providing ample protection from the elements. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked, rounded wooden logs, giving it a traditional rustic appearance. The front facade features a centrally placed wooden door flanked by two small, square windows with light-colored trim. The side and rear facades each have two small windows, also with matching trim, while the back and opposite side are windowless. The roof appears to be made of a dark, possibly shingled or tarred material, and the overall structure is low and squat, suggesting a single-story layout. The cabin is devoid of any porch or veranda and is designed for basic residential use.
description: A small, rustic log cabin with a wide, dark gable roof, central front door, and multiple small windows with light trim. The structure is compact and traditional, with no porch and a simple, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: The cabin is viewed from the rear, showing a solid log wall with a single small window centered under the roof overhang.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entrance: a central wooden door flanked by two small square windows, all with light trim, beneath the wide gable roof.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors the rear, with a single small window centered on the log wall under the roof overhang.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows two small square windows spaced apart, both with light trim, set into the log wall beneath the roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with wide overhangs, covered in dark roofing felt or shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Five small square windows with light trim: two symmetrically flanking the front door, two spaced apart on one side wall, and one centered on the rear wall. The arrangement is mostly symmetrical and evenly distributed.
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door, centered on the front facade between two windows.
